programme.title: Brick By Brick
programme.desc: In the swamp, the team uncovers a previously unknown structure remarkably resembling a container. And after weeks of chasing the elusive Chappell Vault, the Fellowship hits a void deep in the Money Pit.

programme.title: The Top Ten Alien Disasters
programme.desc: Ancient Aliens is counting down the top ten most devastating disasters ever documented that might have an otherworldly connection, including a flying monster at a nuclear incident.

programme.title: Bermuda Triangle's First Blood
programme.desc: The team investigates a large wooden shipwreck that could be one of the Bermuda Triangle area's earliest victims: the long-lost SS D.H. Mount.

programme.title: Beat The Unbeaten: Conquering The Kachin Dao
programme.desc: Two previous champions battle it out for the chance to compete against one of our titans of the forge: Gladiator of the Forge Jesse Hu, Superchamp Collin Sage, or our Undefeated Judge Ben Abbott.

programme.title: Beyond The Breakers
programme.desc: Following the trail of a cache of precious gemstones, Jeff and the team move further beyond the breakers, in search of The Neptune. With stormy weather closing in, a new find may lead them one step closer.

programme.desc: Lauro confronts minus 40 weather, a broken sled, and exhausted dogs on the Iditarod Trail while running down the frozen Yukon River. Bret and Ivy make an impressive haul of beaver to finish their season.

programme.title: The Top Ten Pyramid Sites
programme.desc: Ancient Aliens is counting down the world's top ten pyramid sites, from a valley in Peru with over 250 hidden pyramids to an ancient Greek city with 4800-year-old ruins to Egypt's famous Giza Plateau.

programme.title: Escaping Devil's Island
programme.desc: Rene Belbenoit, a petty thief, is captured and sent to France's notorious penal colony in French Guiana. He determines to escape or die trying. His story becomes the basis of several popular movies.

programme.title: The Legend Of The Lost Dutchman's Mine
programme.desc: The search for the most famous gold mine in the Old West has led many to perish in the pursuit of its elusive riches. Legend suggests the gold and the land it's hidden on are somehow cursed.

programme.title: Peacekeepers (S1)
programme.desc: This series goes to the heart of the Chinese army as they deploy to a UN peacekeeping mission in South Sudan. Filmed by the soldiers themselves, a 700-strong infantry battalion adapts to life on the base.

programme.title: Sneaker Head-To-Head
programme.desc: Two sneaker companies become industry titans through a decades-long battle, as they unleash iconic footwear that will bring sneakers mainstream and make them part of the fabric of American culture.

programme.title: Easy Money
programme.desc: In the middle of the 20th century, a small piece of plastic revolutionises the world of commerce as Diners' Club, Bank of America, and American Express race to change how people pay for everything.

programme.title: Big Tex
programme.desc: Cruising through the Lone Star State, the Wolfe brothers visit a one-of-a-kind home that was custom-built around a staggering Texas-size collection of pieces.

programme.title: Big Tex
programme.desc: Cruising through the Lone Star State, the Wolfe brothers visit a one-of-a-kind home that was custom-built around a staggering Texas-size collection of pieces.

programme.title: The Top Ten Pyramid Sites
programme.desc: Ancient Aliens is counting down the world's top ten pyramid sites, from a valley in Peru with over 250 hidden pyramids to an ancient Greek city with 4800-year-old ruins to Egypt's famous Giza Plateau.

programme.title: Escaping Devil's Island
programme.desc: Rene Belbenoit, a petty thief, is captured and sent to France's notorious penal colony in French Guiana. He determines to escape or die trying. His story becomes the basis of several popular movies.

programme.title: The Legend Of The Lost Dutchman's Mine
programme.desc: The search for the most famous gold mine in the Old West has led many to perish in the pursuit of its elusive riches. Legend suggests the gold and the land it's hidden on are somehow cursed.

programme.title: Peacekeepers (S1)
programme.desc: This series goes to the heart of the Chinese army as they deploy to a UN peacekeeping mission in South Sudan. Filmed by the soldiers themselves, a 700-strong infantry battalion adapts to life on the base.

programme.title: Sneaker Head-To-Head
programme.desc: Two sneaker companies become industry titans through a decades-long battle, as they unleash iconic footwear that will bring sneakers mainstream and make them part of the fabric of American culture.

programme.title: Easy Money
programme.desc: In the middle of the 20th century, a small piece of plastic revolutionises the world of commerce as Diners' Club, Bank of America, and American Express race to change how people pay for everything.

programme.title: Strange Afflictions
programme.desc: A trip to the doctor is sure to cure any afflicted individual, but what happens when even the doctors are stunned by what they see? Like a family cursed with blue skin.

programme.title: Mysterious Sacred Structures
programme.desc: England's Stonehenge and the Moai statues of Easter Island have inspired awe for centuries. But will we ever fully understand how and why these ancient sacred structures came to be?

programme.title: Siegfried And Rick
programme.desc: When a customer walks into the shop with a signature worthy of presidential praise, can Corey make a new deal? Meanwhile, Chum heads to a prop house in L.A. to reflect on some historic Hollywood items.

programme.title: The Great Razooly
programme.desc: Flying solo, Mike heads to the California castle home of the Great Razooly-a sculptor, entrepreneur, and horror icon whose collection includes monsters, gargoyles, and a rocket ship on the front lawn.

programme.title: Happy Accidents
programme.desc: Two chance discoveries in the 1950s turn mundane industrial materials into legendary toys. Etch A Sketch and Play-Doh will rake in billions for decades to come, but not everyone will reap the rewards.

programme.title: Dog Eat Dog
programme.desc: At a time when dog food is a rarity and cat food is almost nonexistent, it will take visionary innovators to invent the first dog treat, the first cat food, and many more innovations.

programme.title: Ramen
programme.desc: This episode delves into the history of ramen, from Asakusa's "Rairaiken," which is said to have created the prototype for today's ramen, to the yatai ramen of the Showa period.

programme.title: 新闻今日谈 (9/5/26)
programme.desc: 此节目针对每天最热门的时事话题，在观众最关注的时刻即时作出评论，让观众更洞悉事件的真相。

programme.title: 石评天下
programme.desc: 《石评天下》是一档深度政治评论性的周播专题节目。节目透过三个环：「石观世界」、「齐论古今」及「平说新语」 ，由资深评论员石齐平以独特的观点。

programme.title: 我们和它们
programme.desc: 以纪实拍摄手法，从人与动物、自然和谐相处的角度，讲述跨物种的感人故事，见证人与动物之间源于爱、超越爱的情感。

programme.title: 我们和它们
programme.desc: 以纪实拍摄手法，从人与动物、自然和谐相处的角度，讲述跨物种的感人故事，见证人与动物之间源于爱、超越爱的情感。

programme.title: 皇牌大放送
programme.desc: 皇牌大放送题材广泛，兼备即时性及互动性，从古至今、东西南北的历史文化，到热门国际时事焦点以及音乐娱乐表演等等，应有尽有！

programme.title: 纪录大时代
programme.desc: 联合中国各顶级卫视及电视制作机构，汇聚优秀精品纪录片集中展映。

programme.title: 筑梦天下
programme.desc: 荟萃中外历史建筑，赏析现代经典设计；寻访民居风俗故事，分享另类家居理念。

programme.title: 凤凰早班车 (10/5/26 Pt1)
programme.desc: 透过凤凰卫视庞大的报导网络从国际各个主要通讯社如美联社、路透社等获得新闻资讯，由主持人在您上班或上课前，率先向观众报导国际间最新发生的重大事情。

programme.title: 大新闻大历史
programme.desc: 《大新闻大历史》将视角放在新闻背后的历史渊源，以纪录片的形式，梳理出新闻事件纵深的故事。

programme.title: 我的香港故事
programme.desc: 以自述的方式讲述普通香港人的故事，反映他们普通却独到的闪光之处。

programme.title: 凤凰正点播报 (10/5/26)
programme.desc: 每天从零点到零点，《凤凰正点播报》为您循环不息地追踪全球各个角落、各个领域最有价值、新鲜热辣的新闻大事。第一时间让您知道天下事的最新发展。

programme.title: Murder At The Derby

programme.title: M53: Chennai Super Kings vs Lucknow Super Giants
programme.desc: The 19th edition of the Indian Premier League once again bring together leading international and domestic cricketers in India’s premier T20 competition. The tournament will feature 10 teams competing in 74 matches.

programme.title: 智能爱人
programme.desc: 高端智能人阿宝(李佳芯饰)出厂时意外走失，流落人间，落入古怪寻常百姓家。人工智能公司职员古家廉(陆永饰)如获至宝，私下将阿宝据为己有。阿宝为协助古家四名家族成员执行各项奇怪任务，启动自我学习功能，自此尝尽人间百味的七情六欲，更爱上了主人家廉，体会情为何物。公司高层兼情敌多姐(冯盈盈饰)在公在私对阿宝穷追不舍，誓要把她彻底销毁！与此同时，阿宝却侦测到自己身中计算机病毒，生命正在倒数……

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 地狱天使
programme.desc: 年轻貌美的儿（张可颐），牵涉毒杀富翁及争夺遗产，找来石（陈启泰）当其辩护律师。儿的背景神秘复杂，且于有意无意间对石作出挑逗，令石留下深刻印象。_x000D__x000D_原来儿为石妻珊（苏玉华）之同父异母姐妹。儿因痛恨珊母当年抢走其父，致儿母沦为妓女，儿更惨遭嫖客强奸。儿誓要向珊母女二人进行报复。儿接近石，是为要珊婚姻决裂，家破人亡。_x000D__x000D_在儿的精心布局下，石渐转投其怀抱。儿见目标已达，欲抽身离去，却惊觉自己爱上了石。此时，儿情人关（何英伟）利用儿陷害石作其替死鬼，以掩饰其商业罪行……

programme.title: 锦绣良缘
programme.desc: 程家世代经营染布业，程父与元配早逝，程二太太上官丹凤﹝黄淑仪﹞一直当家作主，把家业打理得井井有条。_x000D__x000D_长子智盛﹝罗莽﹞性格戆直，娶得贤妻周梦娴﹝苏玉华﹞。次子智博﹝阮兆祥﹞为人急功近利，和锱铢必较的妻子薛小小﹝郭少芸﹞是对欢喜冤家。叁子智勇﹝郑中基﹞心地善良但只管吃喝玩乐，其妻郑艳﹝梅小惠﹞为人势利却爱夫心切。四子智轩博学多闻、温文尔雅，却要奉皇上圣旨跟率性不羁的吐蕃女子顿珠﹝文颂娴﹞成婚。智轩和顿珠性格迥异，时有争执，二人不但无夫妻之实，而且常常斗气，因而闹出不少笑话来。期间，智轩爱上女子周梦诗﹝邝文珣﹞，顿珠大方地从中撮合，智轩心存感激。及后梦诗移情别恋，智轩若有所失，顿珠从旁安慰，二人竟又渐生情愫。程家因得罪权贵而尽失祖业，智轩更因一个惊人的秘密而惹来杀身之祸……

programme.title: 智能爱人
programme.desc: 高端智能人阿宝(李佳芯饰)出厂时意外走失，流落人间，落入古怪寻常百姓家。人工智能公司职员古家廉(陆永饰)如获至宝，私下将阿宝据为己有。阿宝为协助古家四名家族成员执行各项奇怪任务，启动自我学习功能，自此尝尽人间百味的七情六欲，更爱上了主人家廉，体会情为何物。公司高层兼情敌多姐(冯盈盈饰)在公在私对阿宝穷追不舍，誓要把她彻底销毁！与此同时，阿宝却侦测到自己身中计算机病毒，生命正在倒数……

programme.title: 智能爱人
programme.desc: 高端智能人阿宝(李佳芯饰)出厂时意外走失，流落人间，落入古怪寻常百姓家。人工智能公司职员古家廉(陆永饰)如获至宝，私下将阿宝据为己有。阿宝为协助古家四名家族成员执行各项奇怪任务，启动自我学习功能，自此尝尽人间百味的七情六欲，更爱上了主人家廉，体会情为何物。公司高层兼情敌多姐(冯盈盈饰)在公在私对阿宝穷追不舍，誓要把她彻底销毁！与此同时，阿宝却侦测到自己身中计算机病毒，生命正在倒数……

programme.title: 智能爱人
programme.desc: 高端智能人阿宝(李佳芯饰)出厂时意外走失，流落人间，落入古怪寻常百姓家。人工智能公司职员古家廉(陆永饰)如获至宝，私下将阿宝据为己有。阿宝为协助古家四名家族成员执行各项奇怪任务，启动自我学习功能，自此尝尽人间百味的七情六欲，更爱上了主人家廉，体会情为何物。公司高层兼情敌多姐(冯盈盈饰)在公在私对阿宝穷追不舍，誓要把她彻底销毁！与此同时，阿宝却侦测到自己身中计算机病毒，生命正在倒数……

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 地狱天使
programme.desc: 年轻貌美的儿（张可颐），牵涉毒杀富翁及争夺遗产，找来石（陈启泰）当其辩护律师。儿的背景神秘复杂，且于有意无意间对石作出挑逗，令石留下深刻印象。_x000D__x000D_原来儿为石妻珊（苏玉华）之同父异母姐妹。儿因痛恨珊母当年抢走其父，致儿母沦为妓女，儿更惨遭嫖客强奸。儿誓要向珊母女二人进行报复。儿接近石，是为要珊婚姻决裂，家破人亡。_x000D__x000D_在儿的精心布局下，石渐转投其怀抱。儿见目标已达，欲抽身离去，却惊觉自己爱上了石。此时，儿情人关（何英伟）利用儿陷害石作其替死鬼，以掩饰其商业罪行……

programme.title: 锦绣良缘
programme.desc: 程家世代经营染布业，程父与元配早逝，程二太太上官丹凤﹝黄淑仪﹞一直当家作主，把家业打理得井井有条。_x000D__x000D_长子智盛﹝罗莽﹞性格戆直，娶得贤妻周梦娴﹝苏玉华﹞。次子智博﹝阮兆祥﹞为人急功近利，和锱铢必较的妻子薛小小﹝郭少芸﹞是对欢喜冤家。叁子智勇﹝郑中基﹞心地善良但只管吃喝玩乐，其妻郑艳﹝梅小惠﹞为人势利却爱夫心切。四子智轩博学多闻、温文尔雅，却要奉皇上圣旨跟率性不羁的吐蕃女子顿珠﹝文颂娴﹞成婚。智轩和顿珠性格迥异，时有争执，二人不但无夫妻之实，而且常常斗气，因而闹出不少笑话来。期间，智轩爱上女子周梦诗﹝邝文珣﹞，顿珠大方地从中撮合，智轩心存感激。及后梦诗移情别恋，智轩若有所失，顿珠从旁安慰，二人竟又渐生情愫。程家因得罪权贵而尽失祖业，智轩更因一个惊人的秘密而惹来杀身之祸……

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 亲亲我好妈
programme.desc: 全职港妈查向善(江美仪)自小接受第一代虎妈于佳妍(米雪)高度严格的管教，潜移默化间对两女儿制订一系列怪兽式子女成长规条，令大女严茜瑜(江嘉敏)尤其反感，母女关系长期处于作战状态，本来担任和事佬角色的丈夫严夏(黄智贤)可从中舒缓紧张气氛，但自身面临中年危机更堕入出轨诱惑，两夫妻竟走向同屋分居关系……向善不单对内严苛，对外亦亳不手软，在家教会与袁圆(吕慧仪)斗到你死我活，幸有不惧恶势力的训导主任文嘉熙(陈敏之)驾驭有术，令两位虎妈渐成欢喜冤家，分担对方鲜为人知的虎妈辛酸；向善一心为女儿打造才女之路，但发现茜瑜与嘉熙弟弟文亮熙(何广沛)谈恋爱，向善找来嘉熙连手捧打鸳鸯，更揭出一个埋藏了十几年的秘密，母女关系濒临瓦解边缘……

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 洛神
programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.title: 洛神
programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 亲亲我好妈
programme.desc: 全职港妈查向善(江美仪)自小接受第一代虎妈于佳妍(米雪)高度严格的管教，潜移默化间对两女儿制订一系列怪兽式子女成长规条，令大女严茜瑜(江嘉敏)尤其反感，母女关系长期处于作战状态，本来担任和事佬角色的丈夫严夏(黄智贤)可从中舒缓紧张气氛，但自身面临中年危机更堕入出轨诱惑，两夫妻竟走向同屋分居关系……向善不单对内严苛，对外亦亳不手软，在家教会与袁圆(吕慧仪)斗到你死我活，幸有不惧恶势力的训导主任文嘉熙(陈敏之)驾驭有术，令两位虎妈渐成欢喜冤家，分担对方鲜为人知的虎妈辛酸；向善一心为女儿打造才女之路，但发现茜瑜与嘉熙弟弟文亮熙(何广沛)谈恋爱，向善找来嘉熙连手捧打鸳鸯，更揭出一个埋藏了十几年的秘密，母女关系濒临瓦解边缘……

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: As the nation states Euromerica and New Shanghai vie for supremacy, factory worker Doug Quaid begins to suspect that he's a spy, though he is unaware which side of the fight he's on.

programme.title: Escape
programme.desc: After a prison transport van overturns, Hondo and the team hunt down three female fugitives, including a serial killer on the verge of a rampage. Also, with Annie's return to work, Deacon struggles to maintain a work life balance, and Luca does his best to teach Kelly to drive.

programme.title: Last Call

programme.title: Family Man
programme.desc: The SWAT team faces off with a family of doomsday preppers barricaded inside their fortress of a home, and Deacon finds himself at the center of the storm. Also, Tan clashes with a reporter covering the situation and Powell grapples with meeting the child she gave up for adoption 18 years ago.

programme.title: The Sea And The Hills

programme.title: The Last Word

Sure. Moody teenagers? Hell no. As Tess and Sunny realize this is the work of two murderers working together despite not knowing each other, Sunny celebrates small wins as her therapist has taught her.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Spurs ended a 15-game winless run against Wolves last time out (1-0) and could record successive victories in the Premier League for the first time since their opening two matches of this season against Burnley (3-0) and Manchester City (2-0).

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Defeat for Wolves in this match would mean they’ve lost against all other 19 Premier League clubs this season. It would be just the second time a team has lost to every side they’ve faced in a campaign, after Sheffield United in 2023-24.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Sunderland have won just three of their 33 Premier League games against Manchester United (D6 L24), with their 24 defeats against the Red Devils their most against any opponent in the competition.

programme.title: The Saturday Wrap 2025/26
programme.desc: A complete review of all the day’s Premier League football, with highlights and studio discussion. The Saturday Wrap broadcasts immediately after Premier League Live on Saturday.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Liverpool have lost their last two Premier League games against Chelsea, as many as they had in their previous 20 (W8 D10). They last lost three in a row against the Blues between December 2013 and November 2014.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Though they’ve only failed to score in one of their nine Premier League games against Brentford, Man City’s average of 1.4 goals per game against the Bees (13 in 9) is their lowest against any opponent they’ve faced under Pep Guardiola.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Following victories against Burnley and Aston Villa, Fulham are looking to win three consecutive home league games for the first time since December 2023.

programme.title: The Saturday Wrap 2025/26

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Burnley have won one of their last 26 Premier League matches (D7 L18), coming from 2-0 down to beat Crystal Palace 3-2 in February.

programme.title: PL Rewind 2025/26
programme.desc: One of the most dramatic survival stories in Premier League history, West Ham stayed up against all odds in the 2006/07 season. Robert Green was between the posts for the Irons, and tells the story of their "Great Escape".

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: West Ham are unbeaten in their last six home Premier League matches (W3 D3), last having a longer unbeaten run on home soil between September 2015 and April 2016 in their final season at Upton Park (15 games).

programme.title: PL Stories 2025/26
programme.desc: We join Harry Kewell in Vietnam as he embraces a new chapter in coaching, reflecting on a career that took him from prodigious talent to Premier League star. Kewell revisits his electrifying rise at Leeds United, before confronting the intense scrutiny and expectation that came with his move to Liverpool and then Galatasaray. He opens up about the injuries, pressure, and moments at Anfield that nearly drove him away from the game altogether.

programme.title: The Big Interview 2025/26
programme.desc: Dominic Calvert-Lewin has been Leeds United’s star striker since their return to the Premier League, but it’s not always been plain sailing for the 29-year-old, as he’s faced his own battles off the pitch. This week on The Big Interview, Calvert-Lewin opens up on battling with anxiety at a young age, leaving Everton, fighting off relegation with Leeds and how speaking about his own mental health has had a positive effect on his life.

programme.title: PL Rewind 2025/26
programme.desc: One of the most dramatic survival stories in Premier League history, West Ham stayed up against all odds in the 2006/07 season. Robert Green was between the posts for the Irons, and tells the story of their "Great Escape".

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Defeat for Wolves in this match would mean they’ve lost against all other 19 Premier League clubs this season. It would be just the second time a team has lost to every side they’ve faced in a campaign, after Sheffield United in 2023-24.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Following victories against Burnley and Aston Villa, Fulham are looking to win three consecutive home league games for the first time since December 2023.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Crystal Palace have won just one of their last 22 Premier League games against Everton (D9 L12), and are winless in eight since a 3-1 win in December 2021 (D2 L6).

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: West Ham are unbeaten in their last six home Premier League matches (W3 D3), last having a longer unbeaten run on home soil between September 2015 and April 2016 in their final season at Upton Park (15 games).

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Sunderland have won just three of their 33 Premier League games against Manchester United (D6 L24), with their 24 defeats against the Red Devils their most against any opponent in the competition.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest have won their last three Premier League games, beating Burnley 4-1, Sunderland 5-0 and Chelsea 3-1. They last scored 3+ goals in four consecutive top-flight games in March/April 1995.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Burnley have won one of their last 26 Premier League matches (D7 L18), coming from 2-0 down to beat Crystal Palace 3-2 in February.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Crystal Palace have won just one of their last 22 Premier League games against Everton (D9 L12), and are winless in eight since a 3-1 win in December 2021 (D2 L6).

programme.title: PL Stories 2025/26
programme.desc: We join Harry Kewell in Vietnam as he embraces a new chapter in coaching, reflecting on a career that took him from prodigious talent to Premier League star. Kewell revisits his electrifying rise at Leeds United, before confronting the intense scrutiny and expectation that came with his move to Liverpool and then Galatasaray. He opens up about the injuries, pressure, and moments at Anfield that nearly drove him away from the game altogether.

programme.title: The Big Interview 2025/26
programme.desc: Dominic Calvert-Lewin has been Leeds United’s star striker since their return to the Premier League, but it’s not always been plain sailing for the 29-year-old, as he’s faced his own battles off the pitch. This week on The Big Interview, Calvert-Lewin opens up on battling with anxiety at a young age, leaving Everton, fighting off relegation with Leeds and how speaking about his own mental health has had a positive effect on his life.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: West Ham are unbeaten in their last six home Premier League matches (W3 D3), last having a longer unbeaten run on home soil between September 2015 and April 2016 in their final season at Upton Park (15 games).

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest have won their last three Premier League games, beating Burnley 4-1, Sunderland 5-0 and Chelsea 3-1. They last scored 3+ goals in four consecutive top-flight games in March/April 1995.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Burnley have won one of their last 26 Premier League matches (D7 L18), coming from 2-0 down to beat Crystal Palace 3-2 in February.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Definisi Mencintai Dalam Bacang
programme.desc: Thoriq (Cinta Brian), a handsome wonton vendor, reunites with his long-lost friend Aliyah (Jennifer Eve), who has returned from Germany with amnesia. It turns out her memory loss was caused by her ex, Beno, and his mistress, Cecil, who conspired to get her out of the way.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Jangan Spam Cinta di Hatiku
programme.desc: After a rainy-day argument leads to a breakup with her short-tempered boyfriend, Mika decides to undergo a massive makeover to look her best. In her quest for a 'glow-up,' she meets a handsome cotton candy vendor who calls her out for being 'short-fused' and judgmental.

programme.title: Sejuta Rasa Buat Adelia
programme.desc: Chef Adelia terpaksa menempuh sejuta perasaan dan rasa, demi membuktikan kebolehannya untuk memasak apabila mendapat tahu lelaki yang mengkritik makanannya adalah bos barunya, Idlan.

programme.title: Kampung Boy S1

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna
programme.desc: Hajar masih tidak dapat dihubungi. Luqman tahu yang hanya Qistina saja yang masih bertakhta di hatinya. Qistina mendapat perkhabaran yang mengejutkan daripada Zai.

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna
programme.desc: Luqman kini sudah bergelar suami kepada Marina. Johari masih memaksa Marina untuk mendapatkan duit daripada keluarga Luqman. Qistina masih terkilan dengan apa yang telah berlaku kepada dirinya.

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna
programme.desc: Luqman kesal kerana tidak memberi peluang kepada Qistina untuk memberitahu tentang kandungannya dahulu. Marina dan Luqman mula bertelagah. Ziyan rasa sudah tiba masanya untuk dia berterus-terang.

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna
programme.desc: Sahara terkejut apabila Luqman memberitahu yang dia mahu rujuk semua bersama Qistina. Amanda berhadapan dengan satu kejutan besar. Sesuatu berlaku kepada ayah Marina.

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna
programme.desc: Sahara tidak berpuas hati apabila Luqman bercadang untuk memeriksa DNA bayi yang Marina bakal lahirkan. Qistina terkejut apabila mendengar berita yang Luqman telah diserang.

Recognizing that only he can set his father straight, this inventive kid puts an end to their plans and makes Ray do time...as a dad!

programme.title: Him
programme.desc: A rising star quarterback suffers a potentially career-ending brain trauma after an attack by an unhinged fan.

programme.title: Anchorman 2: The Legend Continues
programme.desc: With the 70s behind him, San Diego's top rated newsman, Ron Burgundy, returns to take New York's first 24-hour news channel by storm.

programme.title: The Alto Knights
programme.desc: Alto Knights follows two of New York's most notorious organized crime bosses, Frank Costello and Vito Genovese, and how their separate paths to power place them on a deadly collision course.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: "The Wild Robot" follows Rozzum 7134, a futuristic robot that washes ashore on a deserted island.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 3
programme.desc: Po must face two hugely epic, but different threats: one supernatural and the other a little closer to home.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: A veteran assigned to extract Earth's remaining resources begins to question his mission and his being.

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: A series of spectacular evil crimes has risen and former super-villain Gru has been recruited to find out who is responsible for them.

programme.title: Last Breath
programme.desc: An emotionally charged action thriller of a commercial diver who after a freak accident is trapped on the bottom of the North Sea.

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War
programme.desc: The story before Snow White: During the war between two queens, the huntsman must vanquish the evil queen before her wickedness rules for eternity.

programme.title: Xxx: Return Of Xander Cage
programme.desc: When a group of lethal mercenaries steal a weapon that pose a global threat, superspy Xander Cage is recruited to lead a team of adrenaline junkies to save the day.

programme.title: Civil War
programme.desc: In a dystopian future America, a team of military-embedded journalists races against time to reach Washington, D.C., before rebel factions descend upon the White House.

programme.title: Splitsville
programme.desc: Carey seeks support after divorce, but learns Julie and Paul's secret: an open marriage. Crossing the line throws all their lives into turmoil.

programme.title: Him
programme.desc: A rising star quarterback suffers a potentially career-ending brain trauma after an attack by an unhinged fan.

programme.title: Imagine That
programme.desc: When a successful executive suffers a crisis of confidence and his career is at stake, he finds the solution to his problems in his daughter’s imaginary world.

programme.title: Weapons
programme.desc: All but one child from the same class vanishes leaving a community questioning who or what is behind their disappearance.

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: A series of spectacular evil crimes has risen and former super-villain Gru has been recruited to find out who is responsible for them.

programme.title: Stardust
programme.desc: A young man discovers the meaning of true love while battling princes, ghosts and an evil witch in a quest to protect the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: Rooster S1
programme.desc: A comedy set on a college campus centering on an author's (Steve Carell) complicated relationship with his daughter (Charly Clive).

programme.title: The Comeback S3
programme.desc: Explores the madness of the television world and the bravery of a tragic actress as she struggles to keep her career afloat while balancing her personal life

programme.title: Civil War
programme.desc: In a dystopian future America, a team of military-embedded journalists races against time to reach Washington, D.C., before rebel factions descend upon the White House.

programme.title: The Spongebob Squarepants Movie
programme.desc: Spongebob Squarepants leaves Bikini Bottom to track down King Neptune's stolen crown and save Mr. Krabs from execution.

programme.title: Mountainhead
programme.desc: A group of billionaire friends get together against the backdrop of a rolling international crisis.

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: In this new take on the tragic love story, a seasoned musician discovers and falls in love with a struggling artiste.

programme.title: Rooster S1
programme.desc: A comedy set on a college campus centering on an author's (Steve Carell) complicated relationship with his daughter (Charly Clive).

programme.title: The Comeback S3
programme.desc: Explores the madness of the television world and the bravery of a tragic actress as she struggles to keep her career afloat while balancing her personal life

programme.title: Euphoria S3
programme.desc: Euphoria follows a group of high school students as they navigate love and friendships in a world of drugs, sex, trauma, and social media.

programme.title: Chakravyuh
programme.desc: Kabir infiltrates a Naxal group on Adil's orders but begins to empathize with them, creating a painful conflict between duty, friendship, and his shaken beliefs. Release Year: 2012 Director: Prakash Jha

programme.title: Dhaakad
programme.desc: Agent Agni, despite her doubts, accepts the mission to capture Rudraveer, a dangerous trafficker. But the pursuit soon leads her into unexpected and perilous paths. Release Year: 2022 Director: Razneesh Ghai

programme.title: Raid (2023)
programme.desc: An honest income-tax officer raids a corrupt politician's mansion, uncovering hidden wealth and facing intense pressure and danger while standing firm for truth and justice.

programme.title: Apna Sapna Money Money
programme.desc: Satyabol blocks Shivani's love for Christian Arjun, who seeks help from clever cousin Kishan to win over her father and unite with the woman he adores. Release Year: 2006 Director: Sangeeth Sivan

programme.title: Attack: Part 1
programme.desc: A terrorist attack renders Arjun paralysed and distraught with the thoughts of his dead lover. So, when the attacker returns, Arjun participates in an experiment to seek revenge.

programme.title: Bob Biswas
programme.desc: Bob Biswas, an insurance agent, is released from hospital after eight years in a coma and is welcomed by his wife Mary and son Benny. He has lost his memory and does not remember the past. Release Year: 2021 Director: Diya Annapurna Ghosh

programme.title: Ek Deewane Ki Deewaniyat
programme.desc: Vikramaditya Bhonsle, a powerful politician, falls for rising actress Adaa Randhawa. Love slowly turns obsessive, forcing Adaa to make a brave, life-altering decision to survive and reclaim freedom. Release Year: 2025 Director: Milap Zaveri

programme.title: Holiday
programme.desc: While holidaying in Goa with her family, a shy Muskaan falls for Dino, a dancer at the resort. Problems ensue when her father objects to their relationship as he believes Dino has impregnated a woman. Release Year: 2006 Director: Pooja Bhatt

programme.title: Buddha In Traffic Jam
programme.desc: A carefree student is drawn into a professor's radical ideology and becomes entangled in campus politics, manipulation, and hidden agendas that gradually put his beliefs and life at risk.

programme.title: Attack: Part 1
programme.desc: A terrorist attack renders Arjun paralysed and distraught with the thoughts of his dead lover. So, when the attacker returns, Arjun participates in an experiment to seek revenge.

programme.title: Gopichand Jasoos
programme.desc: Detective Gopichand Jasoos tracks stolen diamonds to Goa, but rival hunters close in, forcing him into a clever race filled with danger and twists. Release Year: 1982 Director: Naresh Kumar

programme.title: Super Nani
programme.desc: The movie about a woman who is always insulted by her family. While her children, don't care for their mother, her grandson decides to change her. Release Year: 2014 Director: Indra Kumar

programme.title: Hero Hindustani
programme.desc: A man realizes that India is completely alien to his London-raised granddaughter and arranges her marriage there. She gets a guide to pose as her fiance and falls for him. Release Year: 1998 Director: Aziz Sejawal

programme.title: Raid (2023)
programme.desc: An honest income-tax officer raids a corrupt politician's mansion, uncovering hidden wealth and facing intense pressure and danger while standing firm for truth and justice.

programme.title: STAND UP COMEDY ACADEMY 4
programme.desc: Stand Up Comedy Academy (Season 4) is the fourth installment of the popular comedian talent search competition aired on Indosiar. This season features a refreshed lineup of hosts, bringing together the dynamic chemistry of Ayu Dewi, Gilang Dirga, Arie Kriting, Andhika Pratama, and Uus to lead the hunt for Indonesia’s next comedy star.

programme.title: Neng Pete Bau Cintanya Warbiyasah
programme.desc: Dania (Shanice Margaretha) sells petai chili sauce on campus. One day, she accidentally meets Kenny (Aliando Syarief), a rich kid. Kenny's father holds an important position on campus. However, Dania is upset by Kenny's actions, which resulted in him bumping into her and scattering his wares. Kenny doesn't accept this, and they get into an argument.

programme.desc: Program infotainment yang membahas kehidupan selebriti secara mendalam.

programme.desc: Revealing the Wisdom Behind Sin is a project that assesses events or incidents from an Islamic perspective, revealing the wisdom behind sin.

programme.title: Masuk Kuping Kiri Keluar Beli Keripik
programme.desc: Nando (El Ryan Carlen) and Tara (Esta Pramanita) compete to sell the best-selling chips. Nando and Tara always clash whenever they meet. But who would have thought? From that meeting, they gradually fall in love.

programme.title: LUCUNYA TUH DISINI 23
programme.desc: Sekar (Janna LIDA) is disappointed with his father, like it or not, he has to help his mother earn a living to meet his daily needs. Sekar faced trials after trials with patience, until finally Sekar and his mother tried to raise honey for their survival.

programme.desc: Gaspol, an SCTV game show hosted by Raffi Ahmad, is filled with prizes and tens of millions of rupiah in cash.

programme.title: Ayam Pop Kok Gak Bisa Nyanyi, Kenapa Sih Harus Boong
programme.desc: Noel (Teuku Ryan) accidentally almost hit a girl who owns a broiler chicken named Rea (Amanda Salmakhira). Noel and Rea got into an argument which made the girl annoyed because her chickens almost ran away.

programme.title: Getuk Dangdut Pembawa Asmara Gak Rugi Doong
programme.desc: Kiara (Ciara Brosnan) runs away from home, angry and ashamed of her aunt, Ghita (Shanice Margaretha), who sells getuk. While Ghita searches for Kiara, Githa is assisted by Yudi (Rizky Fachrel), a handsome teacher at Kiara's school.

programme.title: Jasa Boleh Disewa, Kalo Hati Jangan

programme.desc: The story of three young men named Andhika, Gading, and Uus. All three of them lack spiritual depth. They have spent their youth living carefree lives, indulging in pleasure without a care in the world about their future.

programme.title: Hobinya Wara Wiri Suka Mampir Di Hati
programme.desc: Reno (Mahdy Reza), a spoiled brat who doesn't want to be CEO of a company, tries to cancel his appointment letter by stealing files from his office. Nimas (Jennifer Eve), who has just been hired as a security guard at Reno's company, is tasked with keeping Reno from running away.

programme.title: Dunia Tipu Tipu, Ujungnya Tetep I Lop U
programme.desc: The story tells of Acha and Daffa's pre-wedding event suddenly failed because Daffa already had another girlfriend. Then, at the suggestion of her sister, Acha finally went ahead with the pre-wedding event with another man named Mamat. Mamat was given a makeover, like a foreigner who had just arrived in Indonesia. Although it was all a ruse, it managed to annoy Daffa. So, will Mamat's disguise be exposed?

programme.title: Getuk Dangdut Pembawa Asmara Gak Rugi Doong

programme.title: 人之初
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一起撞车事件暴露出一具埋藏多年的尸骨，将孤儿高风（张若昀饰）与富家女吴飞飞（马思纯饰）紧紧缠绕在一起。为破解身世之谜 ，他们携手合作配合警方共同挖清这座城市的陈年黑暗。

programme.title: 人之初
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一起撞车事件暴露出一具埋藏多年的尸骨，将孤儿高风（张若昀饰）与富家女吴飞飞（马思纯饰）紧紧缠绕在一起。为破解身世之谜 ，他们携手合作配合警方共同挖清这座城市的陈年黑暗。

programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】三位律师挚友在专为女性受害者辩护的律所中，面对20年前秘密重现。她们展现钢铁般的团结，直面过去阴影，守护正义与彼此。

programme.title: 法官大人
programme.desc: 康宪在狱中接到了儿子相赫打来的电话，感谢他给自己买了一辆新摩托车。浩英强忍着泪水驱车离开骨灰堂。

programme.title: 微雨燕双飞
programme.desc: 荆国安平初年少年皇帝即位，战事纷涌，民不聊生。六品官员白文泰的侄女茉喜（张楠饰）与掌上明珠凤瑶（王玉雯饰）意外被卷进了是非之中。

programme.title: 乐游原
programme.desc: 改编自同名小说，讲述了朝堂动荡皇权旁落，镇守边关的皇孙李嶷（徐凯饰）被迫承担起平叛重任，与隐藏真实身份的将军独女崔琳（景甜饰）各领一军卷入纷争。二人在数次交锋中相杀相爱。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】志明主动调至心胸肺外科，跟随一妍。启澄发现建邦投资失利，更反对他计划向永成投诚以借钱还债。启澄被迫站在方欣阵营，加入工潮调查小组。方欣领导小组调查工潮起因，矛头直指一妍，指她滥权包庇宇泽……思敬忽然病情恶化，但因经历过无数手术，他已失去求生意志，希望一妍「放手」……

programme.title: 乌云之上
programme.desc: 2017年的夏天，暴雨冲刺过的南方小城，惊现碎尸。女警韩青（孙俪饰）在侦办碎尸案的同时，继续寻找着失踪的搭档钟伟（罗晋饰）。随着案件的推进碎尸案的背后竟然隐藏着毒品大案？

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 黑色月光
programme.desc: 满月不惜一切，都要找到基俊的罪证，将哲贤随身携带录音笔一事转告家朗。警方在蒋家大宅内外搜索却没发现，满月死心不息，与成风探查，竟从附近清洁工的手上寻回哲贤的录音笔。满月和成风细听录音笔内容之际，基俊竟驶着车子狠狠撞来，满月和成风受伤晕倒，基俊即夺走录音笔逃去，毁灭证据。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】德桥因与以珈的绯闻，受到AKL高层压力，不能在董事会上投票给一妍。杏芳向一妍提出交易，若一妍同意医院卖出病人的资料，可换得杏芳的选票，一妍未有答应。建邦被追债追到医院，向启澄表示只能求助永成。一妍借筱蕙获得AKL高层的黑材料，抢回德桥的一票。一妍万众瞩目的手术直播才刚开始，方欣就率领医务会代表现身，指一妍违反专业操守，要即时停职。

programme.title: 逍遥

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 叶凌霜在七海伶婚礼后偶遇彧修明，表达了她想回到过去的愿望。借助云纹的帮助，她成功开启法阵回到了过去，并与七海蕊重逢。为了避免自己成为杀雪狼王的凶手，从而影响七海蕊的命运，叶凌霜将杀雪狼王的事情推给了彧修明。之后，她精心打扮并主动接近过去的彧修明，试图让他爱上自己，以便替代七海蕊出嫁。

programme.title: ONEflight Myrtle Beach Classic Round 3
programme.desc: The Myrtle Beach Classic, a PGA Tour event sponsored by Visit Myrtle Beach, debuted in 2024 is the first PGA Tour event in Myrtle Beach history, and is the first major professional golf tournament to the Grand Strand in 24 years. It is played at the Dunes Golf and Beach Club in the Myrtle Beach, South Carolina. The event will feature a purse of $3.9 million with 300 FedExCup points awarded to the champion.

programme.title: Mizuho Americas Open Round 3
programme.desc: The Mizuho Americas Open is a women's professional golf tournament on the LPGA Tour held at Liberty National Golf Club in Jersey City, New Jersey. It is a fairly new tournament on the LPGA Tour with the inaugural event making its debut back in June 2023. It has a prize fund of $3 million, among the highest on tour for a non-major event.

programme.title: Alexander Armstrong in India (S1)
programme.desc: Alexander begins in Mumbai, riding the city's gleaming new metro before venturing into a forest with the world's highest concentration of leopards. From there, he heads to Bangalore, India's tech capital, where the future and tradition sit side by side.

programme.title: Wild London
programme.desc: After a life spent travelling the world, Sir David Attenborough returns home to show us the hidden natural wonders of his favourite place on earth.

programme.title: Food Factory (S2)
programme.desc: Discover how the makers of madras sambar, an ancient Indian vegetable stew, manage to fit an entire aromatic meal into a small can; the surprisingly sumptuous combo of lemony chocolate and cottage cheese is molded into Moo Moo bars, a modern update of a frozen Russian treat.

programme.title: Food Factory (S2)
programme.desc: Discover how irresistibly flaky sausage rolls were formerly a snack fit for just a king; fluffy, sugary Peeps marshmallows come out looking like adorable baby chicks; bright colored Candy Tree lollipops get their sweet and sour flavor.

programme.title: Congo
programme.desc: Simon Reeve battles his way across the Congo, braving thick jungle and tropical swamps in search of the people and the wildlife who make their home in Africa's greatest rainforest.

programme.title: Romania
programme.desc: Joanna heads towards the Danube Delta, one of the last great wilderness areas remaining in Europe, full of birdlife including the majestic Pelican. At the mouth of the river, on Romania's Black Sea coast, Joanna bids farewell to the Danube and reflects on her amazing journey.

programme.title: Japan
programme.desc: For 250 years Japan has thrived, largely cut off from the west - until US gunboats arrive.

programme.title: 人之初
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一起撞车事件暴露出一具埋藏多年的尸骨，将孤儿高风（张若昀饰）与富家女吴飞飞（马思纯饰）紧紧缠绕在一起。为破解身世之谜 ，他们携手合作配合警方共同挖清这座城市的陈年黑暗。

programme.title: 法官大人
programme.desc: 康宪在狱中接到了儿子相赫打来的电话，感谢他给自己买了一辆新摩托车。浩英强忍着泪水驱车离开骨灰堂。

programme.title: 微雨燕双飞
programme.desc: 荆国安平初年少年皇帝即位，战事纷涌，民不聊生。六品官员白文泰的侄女茉喜（张楠饰）与掌上明珠凤瑶（王玉雯饰）意外被卷进了是非之中。

programme.title: 乐游原
programme.desc: 改编自同名小说，讲述了朝堂动荡皇权旁落，镇守边关的皇孙李嶷（徐凯饰）被迫承担起平叛重任，与隐藏真实身份的将军独女崔琳（景甜饰）各领一军卷入纷争。二人在数次交锋中相杀相爱。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】志明主动调至心胸肺外科，跟随一妍。启澄发现建邦投资失利，更反对他计划向永成投诚以借钱还债。启澄被迫站在方欣阵营，加入工潮调查小组。方欣领导小组调查工潮起因，矛头直指一妍，指她滥权包庇宇泽……思敬忽然病情恶化，但因经历过无数手术，他已失去求生意志，希望一妍「放手」……

programme.title: 乌云之上
programme.desc: 2017年的夏天，暴雨冲刺过的南方小城，惊现碎尸。女警韩青（孙俪饰）在侦办碎尸案的同时，继续寻找着失踪的搭档钟伟（罗晋饰）。随着案件的推进碎尸案的背后竟然隐藏着毒品大案？

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 黑色月光
programme.desc: 满月不惜一切，都要找到基俊的罪证，将哲贤随身携带录音笔一事转告家朗。警方在蒋家大宅内外搜索却没发现，满月死心不息，与成风探查，竟从附近清洁工的手上寻回哲贤的录音笔。满月和成风细听录音笔内容之际，基俊竟驶着车子狠狠撞来，满月和成风受伤晕倒，基俊即夺走录音笔逃去，毁灭证据。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】德桥因与以珈的绯闻，受到AKL高层压力，不能在董事会上投票给一妍。杏芳向一妍提出交易，若一妍同意医院卖出病人的资料，可换得杏芳的选票，一妍未有答应。建邦被追债追到医院，向启澄表示只能求助永成。一妍借筱蕙获得AKL高层的黑材料，抢回德桥的一票。一妍万众瞩目的手术直播才刚开始，方欣就率领医务会代表现身，指一妍违反专业操守，要即时停职。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 叶凌霜在七海伶婚礼后偶遇彧修明，表达了她想回到过去的愿望。借助云纹的帮助，她成功开启法阵回到了过去，并与七海蕊重逢。为了避免自己成为杀雪狼王的凶手，从而影响七海蕊的命运，叶凌霜将杀雪狼王的事情推给了彧修明。之后，她精心打扮并主动接近过去的彧修明，试图让他爱上自己，以便替代七海蕊出嫁。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: Copa Colsanitas Colsubsidio (250) Final
programme.desc: The Copa Colsanitas is a women's professional tennis tournament held in Bogotá, Colombia, at the Country Club de Bogotá. Held since 1998, this WTA 250 tournament is played on outdoor clay courts.

programme.title: Episode 40
programme.desc: Catch all the happenings in and around the world of badminton here on the show Badminton Unlimited.

programme.title: Internazionali BNL d’Italia (1000) Day 4 Session 1
programme.desc: The Italian Open is a premier professional tennis tournament held annually at the Foro Italico in Rome, Italy. Since its inception in 1930, the Italian Open has become one of the most prestigious clay-court tournaments in the world.

programme.title: Day 13 Evening Session: SF 2
programme.desc: The World Snooker Championship is the most prestigious and longest-running professional snooker tournament, established in 1927. Played annually over 17 days at the Crucible Theatre in Sheffield, England, since 1977, it is the pinnacle of the sport, concluding the season's Triple Crown Series.

programme.title: Day 14 Afternoon Session: SF 2
programme.desc: The World Snooker Championship is the most prestigious and longest-running professional snooker tournament, established in 1927. programme.title: Mutua Madrid Open
programme.desc: Catch all the thrills and spills from the clay courts at the Caja Mágica in Manzanares Park.

programme.title: UCI Pro Series - Muscat Classic Final H/Ls
programme.desc: The Muscat Classic is an annual one-day professional cycling race in Oman. It features a 170-179km hilly course designed for explosive riders.

programme.title: IEB+ Argentina Open (250) Final
programme.desc: The IEB+ Argentina Open is a professional tennis tournament in Buenos Aires, held annually on clay courts at the Buenos Aires Lawn Tennis Club. It's a key stop in the South American "Golden Swing," showcasing both established stars and rising talent.

programme.title: Qatar TotalEnergies Open
programme.desc: Catch all the thrills and spills from the Khalifa International Tennis and Squash Complex in Doha, Qatar.

programme.title: Internazionali BNL d’Italia (1000) Day 5 Session 1
programme.desc: The Italian Open is a premier professional tennis tournament held annually at the Foro Italico in Rome, Italy. Since its inception in 1930, the Italian Open has become one of the most prestigious clay-court tournaments in the world.

programme.title: Miami Open presented by Itau
programme.desc: A look back at the 41st edition of the second event of the "Sunshine Double" from the hardcourts at the Hard Rock Stadium in Miami, Florida.

programme.title: Rolex Monte-Carlo Masters
programme.desc: A look back at the 119th edition of the Monte Carlo Masters from the Monte Carlo Country Club in Roquebrune-Cap-Martin, France.

programme.title: Review Show
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: UCI Asia Tour - Tour of Hainan Final H/Ls
programme.desc: The 2026 Tour of Hainan consists of 5 stages, covering a distance of 897.2 kilometers across Hainan province, starting in Haikou and concluding in Sanya, featuring 20 teams.

programme.title: Schneider Electric Marathon de Paris
programme.desc: The Schneider Electric Marathon de Paris is one of the world's largest and most popular road races, featuring over 50,000 participants from 110 countries. The race course starts on the Champs-Élysées and finishes near Avenue Foch.

programme.title: Manben: Behind the Scenes of Manga
programme.desc: Hit manga artist Urasawa Naoki takes you behind the scenes of how manga is made. Honey and Clover creator Umino Chica makes her TV debut as we follow her new series, March Comes in Like a Lion!

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Darwin's Amazing Animals
programme.desc: It's not all monkey business in the villages of Zanzibar Island; the local red colobuses have serious health issues, but they've adapted quite well with an unappetising addition to their daily diet...

programme.title: Time-Lapse Journey
programme.desc: Tokachi is in Japan's great northern land of Hokkaido and is home to vast fields and sprawling pastures - experience its vibrant summer colours through time-lapse photography.

programme.title: Story Land in Classical Japanese
programme.desc: This programme presents masterpieces of classical Japanese literature - in both original forms and modern translations - with easy-to-understand imagery that conveys the world view of ancient Japan.

programme.title: Mitateru-phose
programme.desc: This programme employs 'mitateru', a Japanese technique, to inspire children's imagination by encouraging them to view objects differently and develop their unique perspectives and creativity.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Train Cruise
programme.desc: Journey from Gunma - located northwest of Tokyo - through Niigata and marvel at the colours of early summer. Blue seas, verdant mountains, vibrant sculptures, pastel candies... find your favourite!

programme.title: Japanology Plus mini
programme.desc: Women-only trips and solo camping are some of the many ways that people enjoy camping in Japan - camping can even serve as a method of preparing for disaster. We examine its increasing popularity.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Time and Tide
programme.desc: This programme transcends time to detail extraordinary historical events in Japan and the world - join NHK World-Japan on a journey that reveals the truth behind some of the turning points of history.

programme.title: Cinematic Journey
programme.desc: Daniel Moore takes a cinematic journey through Nagano - he hits the south in springtime to experience the breathtaking cherry blossoms and gets lost in magical winter landscapes up north.

programme.title: Ukiyo-e Edo-Life
programme.desc: The Piercing Gaze: A man strikes a pose in an iconic woodblock print by the artist Sharaku - who is the mysterious figure, what is he doing, and why did the artist want to commemorate the moment?

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Bosai: Science That Can Save Your Life
programme.desc: What does it take to survive a flood? Japan has developed survival skills for floods through experiences such as typhoons - find out how to safely navigate flooded streets and escape sinking cars.

programme.title: Design Museum Japan
programme.desc: Kikuchi Atsuki (Graphic designer) is drawn to enamelware that reflects the creators' own instincts. He talks about the appeal of designs made and used by the same person.

programme.title: Documentary 360
programme.desc: Two renowned Japanese alpinists died on K2 in July 2024. Why did they risk everything on Earth's second-highest peak? Their own footage reveals the courage and legacy behind the climb.

programme.desc: Zookeeper Takaichi Atsuhiro has cared for a polar bear named Peace since she was a cub, including through her battle with epilepsy - We take a look at the ups and downs of their 25 years together.

programme.title: He Thought He Could
programme.desc: When Al finds a library book that is 31 years overdue, he decides to finally face the librarian who once pegged him as a deadbeat.

programme.title: I'm Going To Sweatland
programme.desc: Al is up to his armpits in rock 'n' roll fanatics after Peggy "sees" an image of her idol in the sweat stains on one of Al's tee-shirts.

programme.title: Poke High
programme.desc: While Kelly tries to score with a high school fullback, Al roots for the opposing team in hopes his old school record will remain intact.

programme.title: Part 10
programme.desc: In 1859, George returns home, he finds his son Tom, now a blacksmith. When the Civil War begins, Tom is recruited--and cruelly mistreated--as a smithy for the Army, when he meets a come an important part of their lives.

programme.title: Part 11
programme.desc: The war is over, the Confederacy having surrendered, freeing the slaves. But most people seem interested only in using and abusing the emancipated blacks in the same old way.

programme.title: Part 3
programme.desc: As pandemonium grips Salem's Lot, Ben Mears convinces a few of the townsfolk of the grim reality that vampires have invaded the town, are breeding more, and must be stopped.

programme.title: Bully
programme.desc: When an art patron discovers a gruesome work of art, it leads gallery visitors to find a woman dead in her apartment above.

programme.title: Bombshell
programme.desc: After Jerry Bullard is found stabbed in a parking garage, Benson and Stabler discover that the family man might have had an illicit hobby.

programme.title: Part III
programme.desc: A sinister force lurks menacingly behind the warm visage of Pennywise the Clown, who awakens every thirty years, altering reality to animate victims' greatest fears in Stephen King's IT.

programme.title: Part IV
programme.desc: A sinister force lurks menacingly behind the warm visage of Pennywise the Clown, who awakens every thirty years, altering reality to animate victims' greatest fears in Stephen King's IT.

programme.title: Samantha's Old Salem Trip
programme.desc: Samantha and Darrin find out that 17th Century Salem is no place for a witch without witchcraft.

programme.title: Samantha's Pet Warlock
programme.desc: Ashley Flynn, a warlock, tries to sweep Samantha off her feet but winds up helping Darrin get a new client.

programme.title: Samantha's Old Man

programme.title: Wedding Bell Blues

programme.title: Night Fears
programme.desc: A policeman-turned-professor challenges Jessica (Angela Lansbury) to solve a series of campus muggings that soon escalates to murder.

programme.title: Unauthorised Obituary
programme.desc: Jessica aids an old friend who is suspected of killing an author who had planned to write an unauthorized biography of his famous wife.

programme.title: Prime Time
programme.desc: When the Tanners become a Nielsen family, ALF rigs the people meter to "skew up" the ratings of his favorite shows--which causes havoc for NBC's President Brandon Tartikoff.

programme.title: Thicker Than Water
programme.desc: Sheriff Metzger asks Jessica to help him keep his perspective when his troublesome younger brother is suspected of murdering his employer.

programme.title: Lines Of Excellence
programme.desc: Jessica accidentally discovers a case of computer tapping which leads to murder when she trades in her manual typewriter for a computer.

programme.title: Samantha's Old Man

programme.title: The Controllers (Part 1)
programme.desc: Leonard Nimoy formerly of the Star Trek series and guest star Dina Merrill join the Impossible Missions Force to fight a mind-destroying drug that could enslave the free world in the first of a two-part episode.

programme.title: A Dump Of My Own
programme.desc: Al sets out to fulfill a lifelong dream when he begins construction on his very own bathroom, equipped with the legendary Ferguson Toilet.

programme.title: The Corsican Cousins
programme.desc: Endora's spell forces Samantha to play "Simon Says" with cousin Serena.

programme.title: Pilot
programme.desc: Gil Grissom is the supervisor of the graveyard shift of Las Vegas' elite crime scene investigators. Holly Gribbs, fresh out of the academy, joins the team.

programme.title: Reparations
programme.desc: Jonah Dekker comes to NYC from L.A. to defend his cousin who has been accused of rape. Meanwhile, ADA Casey Novak returns to help Benson and Stabler with the case.

programme.title: 午间30分
programme.desc: 东方卫视是中国其中之一的领先电视新闻和节目平台。透过东方卫视，观众可以看到一个多姿多彩的上海，增广见闻。

programme.title: 东方新闻
programme.desc: 东方卫视是中国其中之一的领先电视新闻和节目平台。透过东方卫视，观众可以看到一个多姿多彩的上海，增广见闻。

programme.title: 关云长
programme.desc: 这是一场发生在三国动荡时期的史诗式之旅。曹操试图招揽关羽加入他的阵营，但关羽忠于他的结拜兄弟刘备，也是曹操的敌人。当关羽试图从曹操手上救出刘备的小妾时，迫于无奈要大开杀戒。最后他能否杀出重围？

programme.title: 少年叶问之危机时刻
programme.desc: 1917年，少年叶问初到香港求学。英文演讲比赛当天，学校发生一宗惊天绑架案，全校同学都被挟持。面对眼前的危机，叶问挺身而出，发现绑匪竟然是自己的师父和好兄弟。少年叶问在危机时刻可否打败绑匪，从而伸张正义？

programme.title: 秦明·生死语者
programme.desc: 被誉为"尸语者"的法医秦明常可在尸体身上解剖出重要的线索。在调查一宗谋杀案时，秦明在实习助手和刑警队长的协助下发现了尘封16年的雪山杀人案，同时亦揭发离奇谋杀案背后隐藏着的秘密。

programme.title: 破坏之王
programme.desc: 外卖员何金银为让他的女神阿丽对他刮目相看，发奋习武，并学了奇怪的招式。胆小怕事的他一次头戴加菲猫面具拯救了阿丽，不料事后被空手道大师段水流领功。银为揭穿真相，最终在擂台使出绝招"无敌风火轮"击败段大师，并抱得美人归。

programme.title: 降龙大师：魔龙咒
programme.desc: 龙王被降龙大师封印了五百年，龙王之女为解除父亲的封印，不惜穿越时空，回到五百年前杀掉降龙大师。但她没想到五百年前的龙王与降龙大师竟是生死挚友...

programme.title: 僵尸家族
programme.desc: 一群盗墓的考古学家意外发现一个保存完好的僵尸家族，计画将他们贩卖至黑市牟利。岂料在运送途中，不慎撕下封印僵尸的纸符，让沉睡的亡灵苏醒逃窜。然而，当地中医师林正英挺身而出，誓要将它们彻底剿灭。

programme.title: 百变星君
programme.desc: 富家子李泽星挂名留学，实际上却挥金如土，并自命情圣，称霸校园。一日，因搭上黑帮老大情妇Silvia，而遭黑帮刺杀，被炸得粉身碎骨。这个财大气粗的李泽星以百变金刚之姿态复活，还掌握了独特的能力，得到一份真正的工作，还有他真心爱上的意中人。

programme.title: 盲战
programme.desc: 前特警队长东谷在任务中罹患永久性失明，之后更被胁迫要承担任务失败的责任。幸好东谷在女儿的陪伴下逐渐走出阴霾，并开始适应黑暗的世界。可是曾经的宿敌再度出现，令女儿陷入危险之中。东谷为救女儿，展开了一场生死盲战。

programme.title: 审死官
programme.desc: 周星驰饰演著名状师宋世杰，经常不择手段为富人打赢官司，让他们逍遥法外，因此妻子迫使他退隐乡间。然而，当宋夫人结识一位丈夫之死被贪官掩盖的妇人时，宋世杰决定挺身而出，再次在公堂上伸张正义，为她讨回公道。

programme.title: 冰封侠之时空行者
programme.desc: 《冰封侠：时空行者》承接前作，四位明朝锦衣卫在现代香港苏醒。为修正历史，贺英独自踏上了寻找「时空金球」的凶险旅程，却不知自己正一步步堕入精心布下的致命陷阱。

programme.title: 望夫成龙
programme.desc: 在乡间长大的情侣石金水和吴带娣青梅竹马，但娣父反对他们在一起，于是二人搬到市区共同生活。带娣为助金水找到一份推销员工作，暗中当舞小姐为其筹款。金水因工作勤奋，受上司赏识，加以提拔。虽然工作发展如意，但金水渐渐发觉自己与带娣的距离越来越远...

programme.title: 玻璃樽
programme.desc: 台湾女孩阿不前往香港，寻找漂流玻璃樽中那封浪漫纸条的作者阿拔。谁料现实阿拔与幻想的相差甚远，让她心碎失望、决定黯然返乡。就在命运的转角，她遇上富豪企业家陈子午，就此展开一段意想不到的爱情故事。

programme.title: 种鬼
programme.desc: 故事描述，计程车司机周通(高飞饰)之妻艾莲(玄智慧饰)红杏出墙，搭上赌场常客方明(徐少强饰)。一日，艾与方争执后独自离去，却被流氓挟往荒屋施暴，艾极力反抗，终堕楼惨死。周受一股神秘力量引导，发现艾尸首，蒙眬间，闻鬼语遣其往找巫师设法报仇。自始怪事接连发生，所有与艾之死有关的人均遭鬼怪缠扰...

programme.title: 一代宗师
programme.desc: 这部史诗式动作电影是由著名电影人王家卫执导。故事始于佛山，当时年迈的北方功夫宗师宫羽田公开挑战南方宗师叶问。叶问最终胜出，但后来输给宫羽田的女儿宫二，二人却因此结下情缘...

programme.title: 我爱罗兰度
programme.desc: Lolanto自命风流，一次因伤入院结识了富商的弱智独生女儿阿蚊，她如小孩般天真可爱，渐渐更与Lolanto成为好友。蚊父因此聘请Lolanto来照顾她。不久，蚊入院做智力恢复手术，但恢复智力后的阿蚊与Lolanto建立的情谊却黯然离去...

programme.title: 看不见的他们
programme.desc: 一场车祸后，林月家里怪事连连。全身冰冷的姐姐在镜子里看不见家人的身影，黑夜里爸爸窥探的双眼，和每天凌晨阁楼传来的弹珠声。林月循声而上去寻找真相，却在打开阁楼的门后，发现里面紧锁的是自己的遗像...

programme.title: 除暴安良
programme.desc: 三名持枪劫匪抢劫了一批正在运送的新发行货币，刑警常勇奉命展开调查。随着线索逐渐浮现，常勇成功击毙一名劫匪。然而，其他两名劫匪不甘就此罢手，乘乱密谋抢劫金厂的黄金。常勇凭藉精密的部署，成功粉碎了他们的计划，将不法分子绳之以法。

programme.title: 十万火急
programme.desc: 这是关于香港消防员的英勇救火故事。勇敢的消防员无惧冲天大火，肩负救灾扶危的重任，甚至舍身救人。但当消防员脱下制服后，是否仍同样勇敢地面对自身的难题呢？

programme.title: 画魔人
programme.desc: 若为和两位闺蜜回到她儿时居住的房子，重遇一直住在那儿的表哥。他们本打算一起散散心，却频频遭遇灵异事件的侵袭，最后更变成一场惊心动魄之旅，有让人意想不到的结局。

programme.title: 武松斗杀西门庆
programme.desc: 武松因发现他的嫂子潘金莲与富家子弟西门庆有染，而被西门庆设计将他流放一年，在此期间，他的哥哥武大郎不幸被杀并火化下葬。武松回家后，告上公堂，谁知县令三言两语打回状子，潦草结案。武松最终能否为哥哥报仇？

programme.title: 师兄撞鬼
programme.desc: 该片描述董骠调查制造毒品案，却惨死在毒贩枪下。董骠化做鬼魂回警察局，借警员周星驰之手查清杀己的凶手。冯淬帆和周星驰在茅山老祖的指导下利用灵药合力斗败邪恶法师，枪毙邓公子，为董骠报了仇，使他能安心上天堂。

programme.title: 六耳猕猴
programme.desc: 生命之树被烧毁后，世间陷入一片混沌。为拯救苍生，孙悟空决定回到过去，帮助生命之树复活。因为失去了金箍棒，孙悟空力量时有时无，只得找回儿时的自己，一同前往寻找时间之力。不料，六耳猕猴却想据为己有，两人就此爆发激战。

programme.title: 我爱神仙遮
programme.desc: 推土车司机阿成，在工作时忽遇地陷而堕入一地下古庙，无意中成为油纸伞妖的主人。她更将自己现身的秘密及超凡的法力告知阿成。地盘工目凡叔嗜赌，欠下恶少高利贷，恶少垂涎凡叔之女美色，要凡叔以女还债；阿成得悉后请伞妖戏弄恶少，并暗助凡叔在赌场获胜，清还债项。惟此神伞之秘密却被恶少发现...

programme.title: 大内密探零零发
programme.desc: 零零发是宫廷四大高手之一，专职保卫皇帝的安全。虽然不谙武功，却有着不寻常的嗜好：打造超越时代的发明。皇上被掳后，他靠着自己的过人发明救驾。

programme.title: 雪儿
programme.desc: 舞蹈教师雪儿年轻貌美，被富商戴家乐力追，但她却喜欢青年艺术家阿化，并与他同居。戴家乐心有不甘，设计让雪儿对他改观，更利诱阿化离开雪儿！

programme.title: 靓女差馆
programme.desc: 雷女警长率领的港岛东刑事侦缉组的组员全是女警，因此有「靓女差馆」之称。警员生啤和沙爹对各女警一见难忘，遂主动申请调职到靓女差馆，意图接近众女并展开追求。这时，靓女差馆收到炸弹恐吓，她们最后能化解危机吗？

programme.title: 反收数特遣队
programme.desc: 在金融危机期间，绝大多数香港市民陷入债务困境。此时，贵利集团采取无情手段逼迫债务人还款，李探员与其地下部队誓言缉拿这个非法组织的头目。

programme.title: 倾城之恋
programme.desc: 本片由香港导演许鞍华执导，改编自著名小说家张爱玲的同名小说，是一个发生在日军入侵香港期间的爱情故事。一个内向的上海离婚女子和一个愤世嫉俗的马来西亚花花公子互相倾慕。但因时局动荡，两人多次被迫分开，最终能否有情人终成眷属?

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Hotel Elevator / The Crew Builds A Popcorn-Cat Cafe
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew steps in to help at Hotel Hadley after a snowy surprise. But when the stairs aren't fast enough, it's time to bow wow build! // Cafe Carl adopted kittens! But when they cause popcorn pandemonium, Rubble & Crew make the cafe cat-friendly

programme.title: Dora's Mermaid Adventure / Mermazing Surprise
programme.desc: Dora and Boots become mermaids and help Marisol the Mermaid save her home, Sirena Sea! // Dora and Boots go across the sea to help their dolphin friend find the best gift ever, a magic jewel!

programme.title: Octo-Swiper / Tudos Juntos
programme.desc: Dora stops a frantic octopus Swiper and saves the Pearl Day Party! // Dora meets Raquel the Rock Lobster and helps her get the missing instruments back in time to play at the big music show!

programme.title: Watch Out For Barbabright / If I Were A Billionaire
programme.desc: The twins visit Barbabright's room. // If I were a billionaire, what would I do to achieve my dreams?

programme.title: The Louvre / Opposite Day
programme.desc: On a trip to Paris, the Barbapapa family will discover the most incredible museum: the Louvre! // Barbalala has decided to respect all the rules of the day of opposites.

programme.title: Child Of The Stars I / Child Of The Stars II
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Lolita spotted a flying saucer approaching their house. // The Barbapapa have taken off aboard Bababam in the hope of discovering the planet of Baby Big Feet.

programme.title: Going With The Flow / The Decoder
programme.desc: The Barbababies are bored, the rain is preventing them from playing outside. // Barbibul has created a clever decoder capable of translating the cries of animals.

programme.title: Paper Landscapes / Cowgirl
programme.desc: Barbamama and Barbapapa are surprised to see more and more billboards on the road. // Barbalala dreams of becoming a cowgirl and Barbidou is determined to help her.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Mega Stunt Ramp / The Crew Builds A Solar Farm
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew use their giant trucks to make awesome stunt ramps when Speed Meister challenges Mayor Greatway to a stunt competition // When power problems shut down Sierra Sparkle's show, the pups hop in their big vehicles to turn the power back on.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Fancy Drive-Thru Restaurant / The Crew Builds A Castle Show
programme.desc: When Camila the truck driver needs a place to stop and eat, the pups and Cafe Carl have a fancy idea. But is it too fancy? // Park Ranger Rose and Rosie the goat are putting on a show! But when Rosie disappears, can the pups find her before showtime?

programme.title: Pups Save the Woof and Roll Show / Pups Save an Eagle
programme.desc: When a big pop star comes to town, a storm blows the whole town apart, including the stage! Can the PAW Patrol save the day? // While out in the woods, the pups rescue an eagle caught in twine and tied to her own nest!

programme.title: Pups Find a Genie / Pups Save a Tightrope Walker
programme.desc: Rubble finds an old brass Jack in the Box, with a genie inside who grants him three wishes! // Francois Turbot is bravely walking a tightrope, but seagulls threaten to ruin his act. Time to call the PAW Patrol!

programme.title: Dreams And Illusions / Dreaming Apprentices
programme.desc: While everyone sleeps peacefully, one may wonder what the Barbababies could be dreaming about. // To dream makes you grow... But what can Barbidur, Barbalala, Barbotine and Barbidou possibly dream of?

programme.title: Ah! My Beautiful Castle / The Sand Is Running Away
programme.desc: During a bike ride, the Barbapapa family discovers an old medieval castle in ruins. // Barbapapa and Lolita were traveling in a balloon, but caught in a storm they ended up stranded on a deserted island.

programme.title: Time Out
programme.desc: Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas.

programme.title: Cookies
programme.desc: Tim gets the best cookies in town but soon finds that others need them more than him.

programme.title: Beach Scanner
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to uncover trinkets buried at the beach.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Sea Wall
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose asks Rubble & Crew to fix the bridge to Bear Island. But when Speed Meister intervenes, the pups have to clean up his mess and protect the bears from a rapidly approaching storm... with help from Auntie Crane's new Bark Yard Zoomer!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Super Mega Movie Screen / The Crew Builds An Auntie Day Present
programme.desc: A new Super Squirrely Whirly movie is playing at the drive-in theater! But when Speed Meister gets in the way, the pups spring into action to save the day. // It's Auntie Day! But can the pups finish building their present for Auntie Crane in time?

programme.title: Croc-A-Bye Baby / Wanna Eampanada? / If The Boot Fits / Pinata Party
programme.desc: Dora and Boots babysit some rowdy crocs. // Dora and Boots get the Troll to try an empanada at Benny's stand. // Boots tries new wacky new boots that Tico invented. // The twins have their first pinata party, but no one can figure out how to open it.

programme.title: Big Rig Blaze
programme.desc: When a windstorm blows away the supplies for Stripes' Animal Party, Blaze transforms into the one Monster Machine strong enough to haul it all back - a Big Rig! There's nothing he can't pull with that Big Rig Force!

programme.title: Borrower Daisy / Can Do Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile and Daisy try to figure out which of her friends borrowed her game and didn't return it. // A perfect "Step-Mother's" day for Maggie all depends on Daisy and Mr. Crocodile finding a can opener.

programme.title: Child Of The Stars I / Child Of The Stars II
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Lolita spotted a flying saucer approaching their house. // The Barbapapa have taken off aboard Bababam in the hope of discovering the planet of Baby Big Feet.

programme.title: Going With The Flow / The Decoder
programme.desc: The Barbababies are bored, the rain is preventing them from playing outside. // Barbibul has created a clever decoder capable of translating the cries of animals.

programme.title: Present / Movie / Vinny
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma. // Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie. // Tim fakes it to prove he's just as cool as Kai's cousin.

programme.title: Monster Machine Rescue Team
programme.desc: Blaze must complete three amazing rescues to join the greatest emergency vehicle team in Axle City: the Monster Machine Rescue Team!

programme.title: Tire Trouble
programme.desc: Blaze and his pals are gearing up for a big race with brand new tires! But when Crusher tricks Starla, Darington and Stripes into putting on out-of-control SILLY tires, it's up to Blaze to rescue them and beat Crusher to the finish line!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Conveyor Belt Restaurant / The Crew Cooks Up A Community Soup
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build! // When Grandpa Gravel is feeling under the weather, Rubble & Crew step in to make his signature soup.

programme.title: The Crew Fixes The Observatory / The Crew Builds A Meow Yard
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew are ready to replace the broken telescope lens at the Observatory. Until it starts a fiery fiasco during delivery! / Cafe Carl's kittens cause construction chaos in the Bark Yard! Can the crew create a conclusion to the cat catastrophe?

programme.title: Pups Save Alex's Feathery Friends / Pups Save a Puffy Mayor
programme.desc: The Paw Patrol must rescue Mr. Porter and reunite an ostrich family before the big birds get into big trouble. // During Mayor Goodway's fashion show, the Pups must save Farmer Al and Mayor Humdinger after a puffy shirt floats away with them.

programme.title: Pups Save a Jukebox / Pups Save a Mayor on a Wire
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger steals a jukebox so he can play an annoying song all day long. Chase and Rubble track it down to save the records. // A hungry eagle causes Mayor Goodway's tightrope walking lesson to go awry sending her careening down Jake's Mountain

programme.title: Isa's Royal Garden Party / Sammy's Surprise
programme.desc: The Queen of Reptiles is visiting Isa, but the garden's a mess! Dora helps her get everything ready in time for La Reina's visit. / Dora meets Sammy the Sloth, who needs to get to Day Camp on time so he can show everyone a special surprise.

programme.title: The Great Key Mystery
programme.desc: Dora and Boots investigate a mysterious key so they can discover more about Dora's great-great grandma, the first exploradora.

programme.title: Beach Scanner
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to uncover trinkets buried at the beach.

programme.title: Tidy
programme.desc: Tim has a clearout of all his old stuff, but soon finds not all of it is destined for the rubbish bin.

programme.title: Pets
programme.desc: Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet.

programme.title: Daddy Loses his Glasses
programme.desc: Daddy Pig is a little upset because he lost his glasses, so Peppa and George try to find them.

programme.title: Gardening
programme.desc: Peppa and George enjoy helping Grandpa Pig plant seeds in his garden.

programme.title: Hiccups
programme.desc: George gets hiccups when he drinks his juice too quickly, so Peppa tries to cure him.

programme.title: Bicycles
programme.desc: Daddy Pig has grown a huge pumpkin and Peppa is riding her bike, but says she wants to ride without training wheels. But soon she crashes into the pumpkin.

programme.title: Polly Parrot
programme.desc: Peppa and George visit Granny Pig and Grandpa Pig's house, and meet their new parrot, Polly.

programme.title: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Peppa and George decide to play a game of hide and seek.

programme.title: The Playgroup
programme.desc: Peppa and George are going to daycare. It's George's first day at daycare, and he shows the class his interest in dinosaurs.

programme.title: Mummy Pig at Work
programme.desc: Peppa accidentally crashes Mummy Pig's computer, so Daddy Pig tries to fix it.

programme.title: Piggy in the Middle
programme.desc: Peppa teaches George how to catch a ball, and later, they play Monkey in the Middle with Mummy Pig.

programme.title: The Barbapapa Tree / The Barbababies' birthday
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama return to the tree they were born under. It's in bad condition. They must rescue it quickly without disturbing the nearby animals. // It's the Barbababies's birthday. They all want to do something different with Barbapapa!

programme.title: Bada-Bam / The Barbamartians
programme.desc: Barbabright captured a melody from Mars. The Barbapapas build a rocket to go to the red planet. // While travelling to Mars, the Barbapapas meet a family of Barbamartians. They have no time to get acquainted when a giant plant attacks the village.

programme.title: Lucky Croc / Sleepover Croc
programme.desc: Daisy and Mr. Crocodile search for a lucky item to help them win a bike raffle. // When Mr. Crocodile can't fall asleep at his first sleepover, Daisy helps him figure out why.

programme.title: AJ to the Rescue
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are racing through the jungle when Blaze gets trapped in super sticky mud! Now it's up to AJ and his new animal friends, to go on an epic adventure to save Blaze!

programme.title: The Trophy Chase
programme.desc: The Championship Race is about to start, and all the fastest trucks in town are ready to roll! But when Crusher steals the trophy before the race even begins, it's up to Blaze and his friends to get it back in time.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Kangaroo Safari / The Crew Plays In The Construction Games
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build a kangaroo safari for Lucas and Lily right in the Bark Yard... until their construction kangaroo hops away! // Speed Meister challenges Rubble & Crew to compete in the ultimate build-off: Builder Cove's first Construction Games!

programme.title: The Crew And Rocky Build A Bear Island
programme.desc: Rocky visits Rubble & Crew from Adventure Bay just in time to see Builder Cove's new baby bear! But when Park Ranger Rose asks for construction help, Speed Meister accidentally ruins the bears' home. It's up to all the pups and Rocky to save the day!

programme.title: Pups Save the Flying Food / Pups Save a Ferris Wheel
programme.desc: Mr. Porter's delivery drones have gone out of control, and now they are air-dropping food everywhere! // Mayor Humdinger steals Adventure Bay's Ferris Wheel.

programme.title: Pups Save a Manatee / Pups Save Breakfast
programme.desc: Farmer Al and Farmer Yumi need help from the PAW Patrol to a get a manatee to the swamp. // Mr. Porter and Alex are in a sticky situation - they're up to their ears in maple syrup! It's up to the PAW Patrol to save the Porter's and Breakfast!

programme.title: Ah! My Beautiful Castle / The Sand Is Running Away
programme.desc: During a bike ride, the Barbapapa family discovers an old medieval castle in ruins. // Barbapapa and Lolita were traveling in a balloon, but caught in a storm they ended up stranded on a deserted island.

programme.desc: Dora and Boots have to wake up the Big Red Chicken before he floats over a waterfall! // Dora and friends must solve a series of questions and challenges to open a mysterious gift.

programme.desc: Peppa and her friends are going camping with Madame Gazelle. When it gets dark, they all sing a song around the campfire. When it is time for bed, Peppa and her friends get a little scared and all the children end up sleeping in Madame Gazelle's tent

programme.title: The Toy Cupboard
programme.desc: Peppa and George's toy basket is full and their beds are covered in toys. Mummy Pig orders a new toy cupboard, but it needs to be assembled - and Mummy and Daddy Pig are not good at DIY.

programme.title: Captain Daddy Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family borrow Grandpa Pig's boat for a day on the river. Daddy Pig is the captain, Peppa, George and Mummy Pig are the crew. When the boat gets stuck in some long reeds. Daddy Pig has to use all his strength to push the boat free.

programme.title: The Quarrel
programme.desc: Peppa and Suzy Sheep are having a quarrel and decide they are not best friends anymore. As time goes by they really miss each other but they still refuse to make up.

programme.title: Bouncy Ball
programme.desc: Peppa and George are playing in the garden with their bouncy ball when Suzy Sheep turns up with two tennis rackets. She uses the bouncy ball to play a game of tennis with Peppa, making George feel left out. Will the job of ball boy cheer him up?

programme.title: The Powercut
programme.desc: One day all the lights suddenly go out and Peppa's house is plunged into darkness. There has been a power cut. While they wait for the electricity to come on again, Peppa and George have fun looking for a torch and thinking of games to play.

programme.title: Daddy Pig's Birthday
programme.desc: Today is Daddy Pig's birthday, but he has to go to work. While he is away, Mummy Pig, Peppa and George prepare a special birthday surprise.

programme.desc: It's Friend Appreciation Day! But when Speed Meister's gift for Mr. McTurtle goes awry, he has to call Rubble & Crew for help. / Rubble & Crew help Lucas make the most awesome Science Fair volcano ever. But will Wingsy get in the way of the eruption?

programme.title: Space Alien Adventure!
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ make friends with a space alien named Gormy! But when Gormy's jetpack loses power, they set out to help him find six special space batteries so he can fly home to his alien family!

programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile takes the motto "finders, keepers" a bit too far. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile arrange a dance performance for Mrs. Flores after they find her old dance shoes.

programme.desc: Blaze and Crusher face off in an off-road showdown: the Snow, Sea, Sky Race! The trucks must speed through the snow, swim through the sea, and soar to a finish line in the sky! Will Blaze win the trophy? Or will Crusher be the all-terrain champion?

programme.desc: Peppa and her family go to the school fair, and do lots of stuff while they're there. Peppa and her friends get their faces painted as tigers.

programme.title: Mummy Pig's Birthday
programme.desc: It is Mummy Pig's birthday, and Peppa, George and Daddy Pig are planning a surprise.
