programme.desc: Holly invites Ben on the annual Royal Fairy Picnic. King Thistle hopes there won't be a repeat of last year's jelly flood. // Holly and Ben try to cheer up Gaston by tidying his cave. But Gaston liked his cave just as it was, all messy and untidy.

programme.title: Boris / Born To Be Wild
programme.desc: The barbababies find a lost baby elephant and secretly look after it. How will Barbapapa and Barbamama react to Boris? // Boris the elephant misses home. The Barbapapa decide to bring him back to Africa. On the spot, they help Boris to acclimatize.

programme.title: Making Bread / From One Pit to Another
programme.desc: Barbapapa wants to teach his children to make bread, but things don't go as planned... // The Barbababies plant an avocado tree. However, it takes years before the first harvest. Barbabright has an idea to save time that may well lead to...disaster.

programme.title: Birthday Party / Tick Tock Mr. Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile wants to be a good guest at Daisy's birthday party since he's never been to one before. // Rushing to get to a concert on time, Mr. Crocodile and Daisy misplace their tickets at Mom's Box and Ship Shop.

programme.title: The Island of Lost Treasure
programme.desc: Somewhere, on The Island of Lost Treasure, there are incredible riches just waiting to be discovered. And Blaze and Darington are determined to be the first to find them!

programme.title: Babysitting Heroes
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are helping their friend Stripes look after some baby animals, when the little critters accidentally float away on big bubbles. Now, it's up to these three babysitters to find their adorable animal friends and save the day!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Rooftop Stage / The Crew Fixes The Lighthouse
programme.desc: When Grocer Gabriel and Sierra Sparkle both need construction help before Banana Day, Rubble & Crew has their paws full. // Speed Meister shines his face in the sky with the lighthouse! But when a ship needs that light, the pups jump into action.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Solar-Powered Bus / The Crew Builds A Lifeguard Tower
programme.desc: When Speed Meister steals Rubble & Crew's bus, the pups have to stop it in time for Sierra Sparkle's big concert! // It's the perfect beach day in Builder Cove! If Rubble & Crew can build a lifeguard tower so the beach can open...

programme.title: Pups Save a Sleepwalking Bear / Pups Save Dude Ranch Danny
programme.desc: The pups need to get a sleepwalking bear back home before he wakes up. // Daring Danny X takes his horse off the trail and ends up on a wild ride.

programme.title: Pups Save the Land Pirates / Pups Save the Birdwatching Turbots
programme.desc: Pirates Alex, Julia, Julius and Chick-ARR-letta, are sent sailing into the desert and got lost! It's up to the PAW Patrol to save these Land pirates. // Cap'n Turbot and Francois chirp for help when a bird-watching contest leaves them up in the air.

programme.title: The Barbapapa Family / The House of Barbapapa
programme.desc: Barbapapa finds refuge in the house that Francois' parents built for him. // The house of Barbapapa is far too small now that Barbamama and the Barbabebe have arrived in his life.

programme.title: Bbarbalalalalalala / The Biodisaster
programme.desc: Barbalala and the family life! / Barbabright and Barbabeau have designed a huge wooden toy powered by an engine using bio oil.

programme.title: Boots / Moon Parrot / Tailball
programme.desc: Tim tries out some new rocket boots which soon fly out of control. // Tim, Tommy and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's MoonParrot. // Tim, Tommy and Tia take on their parents at Tailball.

programme.title: Moon Cow / Nebulator / Space Bug
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia find a lost toy and vow to return it to its owner. // Kai is super excited to ride the Nebulator, but Tim isn't so sure. // Tim and Kai try to photograph the illusive SpaceBug.

programme.title: Friendaversary Adventure / Swiper's Birthday Surprise
programme.desc: Boots and Dora journey to Banana Hill to bring Isa a Friendiversary gift - a flowerpot that Boots painted himself! // Dora and friends throw Swiper a surprise birthday party. On the way to the party, Swiper attempts to swipe his own surprise present.

programme.title: The Little Axolotl / Bubble Trouble
programme.desc: Dora and Boots find an adorable baby axolotl. They have to bring him home, but he keeps wandering off. // The Big Red Chicken gets stuck in a giant floating bubble and is heading straight for a volcano! Dora has to do a mid-air rescue to save him.

programme.title: Sleepover
programme.desc: Peppa is going for a sleepover at Zoe Zebra's house with Suzy Sheep, Rebecca Rabbit, Candy Cat and Emily Elephant. The girls stay up playing games and having fun. At last they feel sleepy. They all snuggle up in their sleeping bags and fall asleep.

programme.title: Stars
programme.desc: It is night time and the sky is full of stars. Mummy and Daddy Pig let Peppa and George put their coats on and they go outside to look at the stars. The stars look very tiny, but when Peppa and George look through a telescope the stars look bigger.

programme.title: Work and Play
programme.desc: When Peppa and Suzy learn that grown ups must work all day, they decide to play at working in a store. But they quickly get tired of it.

programme.title: The Rainbow
programme.desc: Peppa and her family spot a rainbow when they go for a drive.

programme.title: Pedro's Cough
programme.desc: Pedro gets a contagious cough at daycare and other children soon catch it. When it's time to go the grown-ups catch it too, including Madame Gazelle. Doctor Brown Bear gives them terrible-tasting medicine, but who will look after him when he is sick?

programme.title: The Library
programme.desc: Daddy Pig has a book from the library that he has kept for too long. The family go to the library to return it and find more books to read.

programme.title: The Royal Fairy Picnic / Gaston the Ladybird

programme.title: Pups Save the Dizzy Dust Express
programme.desc: When the Dizzy Dust Express appears with no one aboard, the Paw Patrol must stop the runaway train and find the missing passengers.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Fancy Drive-Thru Restaurant / The Crew Builds A Castle Show
programme.desc: When Camila the truck driver needs a place to stop and eat, the pups and Cafe Carl have a fancy idea. But is it too fancy? // Park Ranger Rose and Rosie the goat are putting on a show! But when Rosie disappears, can the pups find her before showtime?

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Castle Show
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose and Rosie the goat are putting on a show! But when Rosie disappears, can the pups find her before showtime?

programme.title: Tooth On The Loose / Scaredy Croc
programme.desc: When Mr. Crocodile loses a tooth, Daisy wants to make sure he gets a visit from the tooth fairy. // Mr. Crocodile, Daisy and their friends are scared to fetch Martin's gloves from his spooky shed.

programme.title: The Louvre / Opposite Day
programme.desc: On a trip to Paris, the Barbapapa family will discover the most incredible museum: the Louvre! // Barbalala has decided to respect all the rules of the day of opposites.

programme.title: You're So Fresh!
programme.desc: Kelly Clarkson drops into the Top Chef kitchen for a Quickfire based on her new movie, Trolls: World Tour, where the chefs are tasked with combining colorful ingredients from six different musical 'lands' to make one delicious dish. For the Elimination Challenge, the chefs are split into two teams to create a cohesive, progressive vegetarian meal for Padma, Tom, Gail and James Beard nominated guest judge Jeremy Fox.

programme.title: Bring Your Loved One To Work
programme.desc: In the Quickfire, it's a true test of communication as the chefs play a game of telephone with their loved ones as they try to reproduce the dish their family member is currently eating at a nearby restaurant. Then, the chefs are tasked with creating a signature product that they will bottle, use on a dish and sell at a food festival. They may get help from their visiting loved ones, but for one chef, the help won't save them from being sent home.

programme.title: Sing Beans
programme.desc: In order to cook the performing food Sing Beans, the gang has to stay up all night as the dish cooks.

programme.title: Grubble Gum
programme.desc: Chowder is forced to swallow his new gum before Truffles finds out he didn't buy enough to share. Soon all of Marzipan City ends up in a very sticky situation.

programme.title: The Cinnamini Monster
programme.desc: When Chowder discovers a lonely monster in the forest, the whole gang soon has to find a way to escape from their emotionally needy new 'friend'.

programme.title: The Elemelons

programme.title: The Heavy Sleeper
programme.desc: When Chowder accidentally puts Mung into a deep sleep, he and Shnitzel must try and wake him before Truffles finds out.

programme.title: The Moldy Touch

programme.title: At Your Service

programme.desc: The 2026 MotoGP sees 22 of the world's best riders battle on 1000cc prototype machines, delivering over 250hp and reaching speeds of 360kph across 22 thrilling Grands Prix in 18 countries.

programme.title: Day 2 Race
programme.desc: Adrenaline-fueled races, legendary global locations, rival national teams and record-breaking speeds. SailGP is the most exciting racing on water - Powered By Nature.

programme.title: The Darkest Secret
programme.desc: A former child star reveals how he survived abuse at the hands of his acting coach.

programme.title: Deadliest Bite
programme.desc: Using cutting edge technology, scientists unveil the secrets of rare shark species' jaws and delve into how these sharks deliver lethal attacks.

programme.title: Castaways
programme.desc: Marooned somewhere in Fiji, Joe and Cody face unpredictable and punishing tropical storms and brave shark-infested waters.

programme.title: Jaws Vs Leviathan
programme.desc: In New Zealand, a clash of titans is about to erupt: the Great White versus a 60-foot leviathan.

programme.title: Samaritan Cult House
programme.desc: Zak and the crew travel to Guthrie, Oklahoma, to probe the dark and mysterious Samaritan cult.

programme.title: Fiat 500 The Italian Job
programme.desc: Ant haggles with a 91-year-old Italian Nonna to get a 1970 Fiat 500, but it's full of faults. Plus, Ant tackles the farmhouse floor as costs soar.

programme.title: Time Travel To Level Up
programme.desc: Matt hunts for "Back to the Future" self-lacing sneakers worth $100,000, limited-edition hip-hop tour jackets, and rare Olympic memorabilia.

programme.title: The Cowboy Challenge The Great Trek
programme.desc: Does Otto have what it takes to be a cowboy? In California, he reveals what he's learned and leads nearly 200 cattle across the prairie.

programme.title: Mysterious Endings
programme.desc: Did the CIA's mind-control experiments kill one of their own? Did Cleopatra really take her own life? Who was behind the theft of a $160m painting?

programme.title: Border Control: Spain (S9)
programme.desc: At the borders of Spain, it's the job of the Security and Customs Services to detect threats from drugs, weapons, and suspected terrorists.

programme.title: Border Control: Spain (S9)
programme.desc: At the borders of Spain, it's the job of the Security and Customs Services to detect threats from drugs, weapons, and suspected terrorists.

programme.title: Italy Fiat Barchetta
programme.desc: Mike and Elvis travel to Turin and set about trying to rescue a rundown Fiat Barchetta. Unfortunately, parts prove almost impossible to find.

programme.title: Malta Ford Cortina
programme.desc: Having wanted to buy a Ford Cortina for 20 years, Mike finally finds a rust-free Mk2 in Malta. Unfortunately, the rest of the car is a complete mess.

programme.title: Scotland Hillman Imp
programme.desc: Mike and Elvis only have a shoestring budget to fix up a Hillman Imp. With a journalist lined up to review the finished car, the heat is on.

programme.title: Hitler's Amerikabomber
programme.desc: Josh hunts for the truth about the Third Reich's Amerikabomber, a warplane designed to obliterate New York City.

programme.title: The Lost Grave Of Buffalo Bill
programme.desc: Josh saddles up to investigate a scandal over Wild West legend Buffalo Bill Cody's remains. The body may have been stolen and buried 500 miles away.

programme.title: Border Control: Spain (S9)
programme.desc: At the borders of Spain, it's the job of the Security and Customs Services to detect threats from drugs, weapons, and suspected terrorists.

programme.title: Samaritan Cult House
programme.desc: Zak and the crew travel to Guthrie, Oklahoma, to probe the dark and mysterious Samaritan cult.

programme.title: Winter's Fortune: A Hole Lotta Trouble
programme.desc: Dave Turin's on the trail of a massive honey hole in Idaho. Rick Ness levels up his racing and mining operations.

programme.title: Shift Happens
programme.desc: As the miners look to find more valuable ground, Shawn must fight the sea's shifting tide, Ken strains his excavator arm when digging hard cobble.

programme.title: Border Control: Sweden (S2)
programme.desc: The security and customs services at the border of Sweden are on constant watch to stop illegal items from entering the country. It's their job to detect crime.

programme.title: Mr Nobody
programme.desc: As Det. Mechelle Soehlig pieces together the victim's final steps, a trail of clues lead her from the site of a late-night house party to a mysterious Icelandic biker.

programme.title: Czechia Skoda 110r
programme.desc: Mike and Elvis try to give a rare Skoda 110R a rally inspired makeover, but they soon discover it's a bigger and more expensive job than they thought.

programme.title: The Beginning Of The End
programme.desc: Dustin hits rock bottom after abandoning The Wall. The crew discovers a new site, The Golden Straits, igniting a frantic race for season-saving gold.

programme.title: Lost At Sea
programme.desc: Problems on land pale in comparison to those on the Bering Sea where the brave men and women of the United States Coast Guard lose one of their own.

programme.title: Cornelia Marie Blue
programme.desc: Opilio season kicks off with the return of the fabled Cornelia Marie. After a 3-year struggle, Josh Harris bought back the boat that helped make his old man a legend.

programme.title: Italy Fiat Barchetta
programme.desc: Mike and Elvis travel to Turin and set about trying to rescue a rundown Fiat Barchetta. Unfortunately, parts prove almost impossible to find.

programme.title: Alien Sharks Ghosts Of Japan
programme.desc: Expert Forrest Galante and a team of shark scientists uncover whether the critically endangered Japanese angel shark remains in Japan's waters.

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。

programme.title: 饥饿游戏
programme.desc: 史上最饿劣的食竞节目! 节目首创以"饥饿"为实境主轴, 想要摆脱'饿'名, 就必须无'饿'不作, 让饥饿指数归零, 成为最后赢家!

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.desc: 聚焦全球大事，从华府到北京，从欧美到亚非，从政治、经济到科技与文化，透过深度而完整的报导，带领观众进入关键事件的核心，补给面向世界的知识能量，掌握国际发展趋势。

programme.title: 最前线新闻
programme.desc: 报导每日全球与当地重大新闻。

programme.title: 女人我最大
programme.desc: 《女人我最大》节目内容包罗万象，从各行各业的奇特文化；社会异象到生活新鲜事，美艳的主持人蓝心湄将带领观众一起探讨及解开谜团。

programme.title: 食尚玩家 疯狂总部
programme.desc: 节目设下最疯狂的任务，主持群将进行任务解锁，品尝在地美食。

programme.title: 11点热吵店
programme.desc: 《11点热吵店》透过年轻世代的角度，无论是两性、职场、人际、时事娱乐等，大谈他们最关心、最想发泄、最有意见的热门话题！

programme.title: 少康战情室
programme.desc: 节目内容包含时事评论与当天的突发新闻议题，以赵少康为主持的政论节目。

programme.title: 地球黄金线
programme.desc: 「地球黄金线」首创专业汽车实境秀，提共最实用的市售车评比、最深入的汽车经典赏析、最夯的车坛趋势，解析汽车科新风貌。

programme.title: 11点热吵店
programme.desc: 《11点热吵店》透过年轻世代的角度，无论是两性、职场、人际、时事娱乐等，大谈他们最关心、最想发泄、最有意见的热门话题！

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest have won their last three Premier League games, beating Burnley 4-1, Sunderland 5-0 and Chelsea 3-1. They last scored 3+ goals in four consecutive top-flight games in March/April 1995.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Crystal Palace have won just one of their last 22 Premier League games against Everton (D9 L12), and are winless in eight since a 3-1 win in December 2021 (D2 L6).

programme.title: Matty Matlock
programme.desc: The team confronts an unexpected final hurdle to bring Senior to justice for the Wellbrexa cover up while defending an airport ramp operator accused of safety negligence.

programme.desc: The $100,000 Pyramid Season 8 continues Michael Strahan's hosting, featuring celebrity pairs alongside contestants playing classic wordassociation rounds to reach the $100,000 Winner's Circle

programme.title: The Hunting Party
programme.desc: Sheriff Mickey Fox investigates a fatal shooting that appears to be a tragic accident during a lavish Fraley family boar hunt, setting off a chain of events with farreaching consequences.

programme.title: Sometimes The Chaos Wins
programme.desc: When a powerful storm sends a massive telephone pole crashing through a family home and traps a woman inside, Station 42 races against time to try and pull off a dangerous rescue.

programme.title: The Bends
programme.desc: Covert CIA agent Martian is called back to London Station. Series premiere.

programme.title: Top 4 > 3

programme.desc: Challenges include treading water as a group and bungee jumping off a 12story viaduct.
